My family is small. My home is in Pinheiros.
David has a daughter. His daughter is a student.
Ana loves her kitchen. Her apartment is near the park.
I have good neighbors. David has two children.
Good morning, Érica! Nice to see you again. Look — this is a photo of my family.
Good morning, David! What a beautiful family! Who is this?
This is my daughter, Sofia. She is a student. And this is my son, Pedro. He is ten.
They are lovely! Your daughter has your smile.
Thank you! Do you live near the office, Érica?
Yes! I live in an apartment in Pinheiros. It is small, but my kitchen is my favorite place.
Nice! We have an apartment in Vila Madalena. Our neighborhood is full of music and art.
Vila Madalena is near Pinheiros! We are neighbors!
Then one day our families can meet for coffee. What do you say?
Good idea, David. Challenge accepted!

Hello! My name is Ana. I live in a small apartment near the park. My apartment has two bedrooms and a sunny kitchen. The kitchen is my favorite room. I cook there every evening. My neighborhood is quiet, and my neighbors are very friendly. My sister lives near me. Her home is big and beautiful. I love my little corner of the city.

Hi! I am Carlos. Let me tell you about my family. My family is big. I have two brothers and one sister. My brothers live in Santos, and my sister lives in Campinas. My mother lives with me. She is eighty years old, and she cooks wonderful food. My wife and I have one daughter. Her name is Laura. Family is everything for me.
I live in an apartment in Pinheiros. My home is small but comfortable. The kitchen is my favorite room. My neighborhood has many trees. My neighbors are friendly.

I live in an apartment in Pinheiros.
My family is small and happy.
My neighborhood is quiet and nice.
What does that mean?
Sorry, I did not hear you.
Can you write that, please?
Just a moment, please.
Let me think for a second.
